attacking_style: Launches long-range solo attacks (14km out in Flanders win) or bridges from breakaways on penultimate climbs, trusting classics engine and power reserves over conservative positioning.
team_tactics: EFEducationEasyPost allows dual-card strategy flexibility, willing to let him sit passive in breaks when protecting GC elsewhere, or use him as domestique in low-probability breakaway scenarios.
terrain_preference: Excels on classics terrain with sustained power demands (Flanders, Strade Bianche) and hilly breakaway stages combining climbs with flat power sections. Struggles in extreme heat.
vulnerability: Repeatedly misjudges uphill sprint timing, launching 250-300m too early and fading badly. Shows poor tactical execution under sprint pressure despite strong underlying fitness.
key_patterns: Chronic uphill sprint mistiming: launched too early at Giro stage, Tour de Suisse, pattern across 4 observations.
Breakaway specialist converting classics power: won from large breaks by bridging on climbs (Giro 2021, Flanders 2019).
Form volatility: defended Flanders title poorly in 2020, fading badly when heat exposed conditioning gaps.
Trusted power reserves over early panic: waits for penultimate climbs to bridge gaps, successful at Giro.
Strong enough for steep repeated climbs, placing third at Fleche Wallonne, reaching finals at monuments.
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 showed continued sprint timing errors and crash at Strade Bianche; no wins since 2021 Giro stage despite opportunities
